title: Public Speaking
shortSummary: Master the art of political communication — from stump speeches and parliamentary addresses to media interviews and town halls. Learn to persuade, inspire, and connect with any audience.
whyItMatters: A politician who cannot speak is a politician who cannot lead. Public speaking is the primary tool of political influence — it moves voters, rallies supporters, and shapes public opinion. Every great political career is built on the ability to communicate.
coreConcepts: Handling hostile questions and media scrums
